reviews.review_description: This is a wonderful one vs. one board game! Looks simple…it is deep!

developer_response.body: I'm very glad you like it, we had fun making it!

reviews.review_description: Hexagon Ultra is a simple yet highly addictive puzzle game that’s easy to pick up but hard to put down. Multiple levels and well-balanced AI keep the gameplay fresh and engaging. While a future multiplayer mode would be a great addition, the current experience is already rewarding and fun for quick sessions or longer play. Another original and enjoyable release from Pixelbrain Studio — thanks!

There is much more to this than it seems at first!I used to love the original Hexxagon in the PC DOS era, this is a really good implementation. You can play bunch of levels against amusingly commenting AI opponents in pleasant environments. Easy mode is too easy for me, but starting from medium difficulty, it can be challenging. Ithink I will be playing this for a quite a while!

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your review! 
We thought about making an ULTRA HARD difficulty level, but worrying about the player's reactions! :DDD

reviews.review_description:
Hexagon Ultra VR is a mind-bending experience!
Fast-paced gameplay keeps you on the edge.
Stunning visuals and immersive mechanics.
A must-play for VR puzzle fans!
Its a unique and very challenging board game. Bug free, cool graphics, relaxing atmosphere. Recommended for anyone, who needs challenge

I used to love playing hexagon on the PC. VR definitely brings it to a new level. I really like that you can play in mixed reality as well.   Runs nice and smooth. Well done!! I will be recommending this to friends.

developer_response.body: We are glad you enjoyed our game! Today we released a performance update and some adjustments for being more comfortable with the sitting play.

reviews.review_description: The gameplay itself is simple, but it can still tie you down, and I found myself on level 20. I like that instead of the simple low-poly graphics, the light and shadows give it such a great atmosphere. The controls are simple, and even after a long playthrough, you can't get the wrist tired of it. The harder levels are a serious challenge and brain exercise. I can only recommend it.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your review! 
We pushed all of our effort to make this game enjoyable :)

reviews.review_description: It is a very challenging game with a lot of levels in very various environments.  It gives me such an amazing time!
